steps.title: Identify what Verdi did for high volume
steps.content: Verdi added more horns, trombones, and tubas to the orchestra, and the passage directly states this action enabled extremely loud volume in his operas.

steps.title: Match the method to the answer
steps.content:
The correct response directly identifies Verdi's method: adding more brass musicians to the orchestra.

The other three choices describe methods the passage does not attribute to Verdi — changing performance venues, using concert hall acoustics, or special vocal training.

That confirms B is correct.
